titleStmt.title: SII 16.279: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 279. (A.R. No. 698 of 1917.) KŌVELAKUṆṬLA, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the courtyard of the Raṅgasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1495, Śrīmukha, Kārtika śu. 10 corresponding to 1573 A.D., November 4, (Wednesday).

The lower part of the record is badly worn out. It records a grant made by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Narasiṅgarājudēva-Mahārāju, son of Timmayadēva Mahārāju and grandson of Nandyāla Narasiṅgarājudēva-Mahārāju to god Paṇḍaraṅga Viṭhalēśvara at Kōgilakuṇṭla in Kōgilakuṇṭla-sīma which was held by the donor as nāyaṅkara from Śrīraṅgadēva Mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhumastu svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1495 Agunēṭi śrīmukha saṁva
tsara kā¨rtika śu 10 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrītirumaladēvamahārāyaluṁ
gāru penugoṁḍa ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhivisā
ṁmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍagānu śrīAkhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁ
hvāṁḍanāyakuṁḍaina kōgilakuṁṭla paṁḍaraṁga
viṭhalēśvarulaku Ātrēyagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ
yajuśyākhādhyāyulaina sōmavaṁśōdbhaulayni
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdyāla naraśiṁgarā
ju dēvamahārājuluṁgāri pautṛḍunu tiṁmayadēva
mahārājuluṁgāri putṛṁḍaina naraśiṁgarāju dē
vamahārājuluṁgāru Anaṁttamulaina daṁḍamu
lu sama¨rpiṁciyicina dharmaśāsanakrama meṭlannanu
mā nāyaṁkarānaku śrīraṁgadēva mahārāyalu
kōgilakuṁṭla śīma kōgilakuṁṭla
The rest of the inscription is completly worn out.
Digital edition of SII 16.279 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
